hooks.command: if command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 "$PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/agent-policy/scripts/check_update.py" --hook 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "$PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/agent-policy/scripts/check_update.py" --hook 2>/dev/null || true; fi
hooks.commandWindows: $ErrorActionPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $py = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($py) { & py -3 "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\skills\agent-policy\scripts\check_update.py" --hook 2>$null } elseif (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { & python "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\skills\agent-policy\scripts\check_update.py" --hook 2>$null }; exit 0
